title: onosma iranshahrii
intro: Onosma iranshahrii, also known as Iranshahri's Onosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Onosma iranshahrii include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Onosma iranshahrii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in the form of capsules or extracts, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
